name: Shylily | The Reunion
description:
Lewd and wholesome, can that be a thing?

Yup, more Vtubers baby, we aim stopping here, no we aren’t at all! For this one though, I decided to go for a more lewdish, but still kinda wholesome vibe? I dunno, I’ll see how I can even do that while I’m pacing around my room at 50 miles an hour. I don’t have enough room space to be doing all of this.

Though, this Lily bit is kinda hard because, well, I don’t know her too well besides from the numerous clips I’ve seen. But that’s not nearly enough for me to create a whole essay. Guess I gotta ask the internet for help.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
